title: heleniastrum varium
intro: Heleniastrum varium, also known as Indian gentian, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Heleniastrum varium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Heleniastrum varium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
